description_long: This object is a handheld scientific calculator, featuring a rectangular body with a slightly raised display screen at the top and a dense array of physical buttons below. The buttons are organized in a grid, with various colors indicating different functions, including white, gray, and green keys. The display is a rectangular LCD screen, capable of showing multiple lines of text and symbols, and is bordered by a dark plastic bezel. The casing is primarily black with some lighter accents along the edges, and the overall build appears to be made of durable plastic. The calculator is compact and lightweight, designed for portability and frequent manual interaction. Branding and model information are visible above the display, suggesting a Texas Instruments device.
description: A compact, black scientific calculator with a rectangular LCD screen and a dense grid of multicolored physical buttons. The device is made of plastic and designed for handheld use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keypad layout and the display screen at the top, with branding visible above the screen.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the raised display screen, with the button grid visible along the length.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back and the lower part of the calculator, with the display screen partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the slim profile and the arrangement of buttons, with the display screen at the far end.
